option.value:

option.name: res
option.value: {"data":null,"message":"User with id: 2 does not exist","status":"404 NOT_FOUND"}

option.name: res
option.value: {"data":null,"status":400,"message":"could not execute statement [ERROR: insert or update on table \"devices\" violates foreign key constraint \"fk_devices_user\"\n Detail: Key (user_id)=(0) is not present in table \"users\".] [insert into devices (location,name,type,user_id) values (?,?,?,?)]; SQL [insert into devices (location,name,type,user_id) values (?,?,?,?)]; constraint [fk_devices_user]"}
